channel.title: Education on Deep Dive
channel.description: Recent content in Education on Deep Dive

item.title: Why I Built a Dashboard for SPM Chat
item.description: A dashboard changed how I make decisions for SPM Chat. Here’s what I track, why trends matter more than vanity metrics, and how it doubles as a control panel.

item.title: I Built a 'ChatGPT' for SPM Students
item.description: I built an AI chatbot for SPM students. Here’s what I learned about marketing, small language models, community, and fumbling a beta launch.
